name: Goan-Style Chicken with Roasted Coconut (Shakoothi)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place coriander seeds, cumin seeds, mustard seeds, cinnamon, cloves, peppercorns, nutmeg and red chili in a small frying pan. Heat over medium flame. Dry roast the spices, stirring frequently until they emit a pleasant aroma.
2. Transfer the roasted spices to a clean coffee grinder or spice grinder and grind into a fine powder.
3. Place the ground coconut in the same frying pan and dry roast over medium flame, stirring constantly. The coconut should turn brown and smell toasted.
4. Transfer the roasted coconut to the bowl with the ground spices.
5. Put garlic, ginger, green chili, and water into an electric blender. Blend until smooth.
6. Heat oil in a 10-12 inch frying pan over medium-high flame. Add onions and fry until they develop brown spots.
7. Pour in the blended garlic mixture and stir once.
8. Reduce heat to medium and add chicken pieces, salt, and the spice-coconut mixture. Stir and cook the chicken for 3-4 minutes or until it loses its pinkness.
9. Turn heat to low and simmer for 25-30 minutes or until the chicken is tender. Stir occasionally to ensure even cooking.
